title: Column summary of a column created by 'show summary on parent item'
excerpt: I am currently using the ‘show summary on parent item’ feature, which is great. However, because I am using that feature, I can’t see the column summary at the bottom. I’ve attached an image. The red circle is where I wo…

posts.author: CassieGeben (Cassie)
posts.cookedHtml: I am currently using the ‘show summary on parent item’ feature, which is great. However, because I am using that feature, I can’t see the column summary at the bottom. I’ve attached an image. The red circle is where I would like to see a column summary.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Cassie! It looks like we can’t see the image here - would you mind reattaching in a reply or edited post?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @CassieGeben

There is an app called Rollup Subitems that can be used as an alternative for “Show summary in Parent”. The app writes the summary to normal monday columns in the parent (not those that are created and don’t sum up) that can be used in other automations, summed up and you can edit the same parent column manually in case the parent items does not have subitems.

posts.author: CassieGeben (Cassie)
